arts.ttl: Nuno Tavares Sidelined: Lazio Defender to Miss Three Matches
arts.sum: Lazio's Portuguese defender Nuno Tavares is set to be out of action for approximately ten days due to an injury sustained during Wednesday's match against Real Sociedad. The official verdict on the extent of his left adductor injury will be confirmed today following medical examinations.
